options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -area
options.description: Specifies the coordinates of the area to verify

options.name: -check_illegal_trim_shapes
options.description: check illegal trim shapes.

options.name: -check_ndr_spacing
options.description: Specifies what kind of non-default rule spacing to be checked

options.name: -check_only
options.description: Specifies what kind of shapes to be checked.

options.name: -check_reverse
options.description: report CONVEXCORNER REVERSE violation.

options.name: -check_routing_halo
options.description: Check routing halo.

options.name: -check_routing_halo_corner
options.description: Check routing halo in the corner

options.name: -check_same_via_cell
options.description: Check the cut spacing from the same via

options.name: -check_short_only
options.description: Exclude all DRC check except short.

options.name: -check_trim_length
options.description: Consider max length in the trim shape layer.

options.name: -check_uncolored
options.description: report color change violation when the dpt layer shape is free color.

options.name: -disable_rules
options.description: Disable the rule that from the provided rule list. the rule list as follow: (jog2jog_spacing | eol_spacing cut_spacing min_cut enclosure color min_step protrusion min_area out_of_die off_manufacturing_grid off_routing_track)

options.name: -enable_post_passive_fill_check
options.description: Check full fill trim.

options.name: -exclude_pg_net
options.description: Excludes the checking of power and ground nets.

options.name: -ignore_cell_blockage
options.description: Ignore geometries of cell blockage.

options.name: -ignore_fill_wire
options.description: Ignore metalfill wires when check drc.

options.name: -ignore_non_rectangle_shapes
options.description: ignore non-rectangle shapes.

options.name: -ignore_trial_route
options.description: Ignore trial route when check drc.

options.name: -layer_range
options.description: Checks between the range of metal layers including cut layers in between

options.name: -limit
options.description: Specifies the maximum number of errors to report

options.name: -max_wrong_way_halo
options.description: Specifies the maximum wrong way halo

options.name: -report
options.description: Specifies the report file that contains the violations information

options.name: -use_min_spacing_on_block_obs
options.description: Use min spacing to check for block OBS.

options.name: -quiet
options.description: Displays the current settings in Tcl list format only

options.name: -nonDefault
options.description: Displays the current settings which are not default settings
